Shell script to set up a Python virtual environment and install development dependencies.

# Purpose
This script is a Bash executable that sets up a Python development environment. It creates a virtual environment using `python3 -m venv .venv` and activates it with `. .venv/bin/activate`. The script then updates `pip` and installs the necessary development dependencies listed in `requirements/dev.txt`. It also installs the current package in editable mode with `pip install -e .` and sets up pre-commit hooks using `pre-commit install --install-hooks`. The `set -e` command ensures that the script stops execution if any command fails.
